subject: Son Gohan with dark hair, in fighting stance, energy beams radiating outward in all directions around him
description: A dark-haired young male figure stands in a wide fighting stance, arms extended, with brilliant white-yellow energy beams or rays shooting outward from his position in every direction. The figure wears a dark outfit. The energy discharge dominates the composition — beams criss-cross the frame at various angles, creating a starburst effect centered on the figure. The background is largely consumed by this light, with hints of sky or open space. The mood is one of explosive power release rather than a charging attack.
foreground: Dark-haired fighter with arms extended, surrounded by radiating energy beams
background: Blazing white-yellow energy rays and light wash
